name: LianBio
business: The company is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on bringing innovative medicines to patients in Asia. It in-licenses assets for development and commercialization in Greater China and other Asian markets. Its pipeline includes eight therapeutic candidates across cardiovascular, oncology, ophthalmology, and inflammatory disease indications.
sellsTo: Patients in Greater China and other Asian markets

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to bringing innovative medicines to patients with unmet medical needs in Asia.

catalysts.event: Topline results from Phase 3 EXPLORER-CN trial of mavacamten
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline results from the trial in mid-2023.

catalysts.event: Topline data from Phase 3 LIBRA trial of TP-03
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline data from the trial in the fourth quarter of 2023.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 monotherapy dose escalation trial of BBP-398
catalysts.sentence: In November 2022, we announced the initiation of a Phase 1 monotherapy dose escalation trial of BBP-398 in Chinese patients with advanced solid tumors.

catalysts.event: Topline data from Phase 2a trial of infigratinib
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline data from this clinical trial in the second half of 2023.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2b trial of infigratinib
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 2b trial of infigratinib in locally advanced or metastatic gastric cancer with FGFR2 gene amplification in the first half of 2024.

catalysts.event: NDA submission for mavacamten in Singapore
catalysts.sentence: In May 2022, we submitted an NDA to the Singapore Health Sciences Authority for mavacamten for the treatment of adults with symptomatic New York Heart Association Class II-III oHCM.

catalysts.event: NDA submission for mavacamten in Macau
catalysts.sentence: In February 2023, we submitted an NDA for mavacamten for the treatment of adults with symptomatic New York Heart Association Class II-III obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (oHCM) in the Macau Special Administrative Region.

tamClaims.claim: China pharmaceutical market revenues of $174 billion in 2022, expected to reach $196 billion by 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Today, China represents the second largest pharmaceutical market in the world, with estimated branded pharmaceutical market revenues of $174 billion in 2022, and which are expected to reach $196 billion by 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 1.1 million to 2.8 million HCM patients in China.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate there are approximately 1.1 million to 2.8 million HCM patients in China, with approximately two-thirds of patients having oHCM, and one-third of patients having nHCM.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 43 million DB patients in China.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate DB affects approximately 43 million patients in China.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately four million HFpEF patients in China.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe there are approximately four million HFpEF patients in China.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 90,000 non-nasopharyngeal cancer H&N cancer patients diagnosed each year in China.
tamClaims.sentence: In China, we estimate that approximately 90,000 non-nasopharyngeal cancer H&N cancer patients are diagnosed each year.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 73 million Demodex-driven MGD patients in China in 2020.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe, based on KOL research, there were an estimated 73 million Demodex-driven MGD patients in China in 2020.
